name: 7-up Apple Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the first group of sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, butter, and 7-Up. Heat until melted. Set aside.
2. Peel and core the apples. Separate the dough from one can of biscuits.
3. Roll out each biscuit individually and place one apple in each.
4. Combine the second group of sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon of this mixture in the center of each apple along with 2 tablespoons butter.
5. Fold the biscuit around the apple and pinch the dough to seal.
6. Place the dumplings in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
7. Pour the remaining sauce over each dumpling.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes.
